headline: Prologis' Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Strong Leasing Execution
summary: PLD beats Q1 estimates as strong leasing drives higher FFO, revenue growth, and improved outlook.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Digital Realty Trust, Raises Price Target to $189
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $182 to $189.
